What's Next

2025 Development

Robot Design 2.0

Building on lessons from 2024, we're developing an even more advanced robot with improved autonomous systems.

Team Expansion

Growing our team with new talent and fresh perspectives to tackle bigger challenges.

Innovation Focus

Applying haptic technology learnings to create breakthrough solutions for 2025 competition.
